news.summary: LinusBio, a prominent player in precision exposome medicine, revealed the launch of ClearStrand-ASD™, a biochemical autism screening test, in California. This availability in California extends the reach of the test to patients and providers across 48 states in the US. Through leveraging exclusive robotics and lasers technology, ClearStrand-ASD aims to improve the early identification of autism spectrum disorder (ASD) and facilitate timely intervention. This development signifies a major stride in LinusBio’s objective to enhance autism diagnosis procedures.
news.headline: ClearStrand-ASD, new autism screening tool, launched in California by LinusBio; now in 48 states in the US.

news.summary: The billionaire tech entrepreneur is calling on supporters to push legislators to "oppose the bill," which could weaken a significant aspect of President Trump's policy goals.
news.headline: Elon Musk pushes to block Republicans’ budget bill, urges followers to “KILL THE BILL,” potentially derailing Trump’s agenda.

news.summary: Shield Technology Partners (STP) has officially been launched in New York with an initial funding amount exceeding $100 million from Thrive Holdings & ZBS Partners. STP is a cutting-edge managed IT service platform empowered by artificial intelligence, reshaping technology services by prioritizing innovation and superior customer service. The company is commencing its operations with a strong base of partnerships, encompassing four top-performing IT services companies - ClearFuze Networks, IronOrbit, Delval Technology Solution.
news.headline: Thrive Holdings & ZBS Partners launch Shield Technology Partners, an AI-enabled IT service platform with $100M funding.

news.summary: In Dallas, Instant Intelligence (INSTANT®) is at the forefront of the financial industry's push towards the November 2025 ISO 20022 compliance deadline. The innovative INSTANT IMS Platform is leading this effort, allowing financial institutions and corporations to not just comply with regulations but also excel in the age of real-time, data-driven payments. ISO 20022 represents a significant change in global payments, facilitating enhanced data capabilities. This move signifies a crucial shift towards more efficient and transparent transactions in the financial sector.
news.headline: INSTANT® aids in ISO 20022 compliance, targeting Nov 2025 deadline, with its IMS Platform for faster, cost-saving results.

news.summary: A cybersecurity company named Exium is set to be acquired by NETGEAR based in San Jose, California. The acquisition has been finalized under a definitive agreement.
news.headline: NETGEAR acquires Exium, enhancing enterprise vision by integrating networking and security for SMEs. #NTGR #cybersecurity

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) and Five Below, Inc. (NASDAQ: FIVE) disclosed the nationwide debut of Five Below on Uber Eats. This collaboration enables customers to access and order a wide range of products from more than 1,500 Five Below stores via the Uber Eats app. The offering includes thousands of items, including fun finds and essential products. This service is now available across the country, providing convenience and direct delivery to customers' doorsteps.
news.headline: Uber Eats partners with Five Below for nationwide delivery, offering over 1,500 stores on the app.

news.summary: NiCE, a technology company listed on Nasdaq with the ticker symbol NICE, recently revealed the recipients of its 2025 International Partner Awards during the Partner Summit gatherings hosted in Croatia and Thailand. These awardees have been instrumental in aiding customers in achieving innovation, meeting challenging deadlines, and attaining triumph in the contemporary period of customer service automation through CXone Mpower. The honorees were acknowledged in various sectors, with noteworthy achievements by the UK&I Partner of the Year – a distinguished partner maintaining a 23-year alliance.
news.headline: NiCE announces winners of 2025 International Partner Awards, broadening CXone Mpower’s global reach. UK&I Partner of the Year.

news.summary: A recent study conducted by GTT in Arlington, Virginia revealed that the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) is one of the top three motivations for utilizing private cloud services among enterprises. This trend underscores the growing importance of stricter governance and control over sensitive data, with organizations prioritizing AI technologies in their cloud strategies. The study highlights the significant role AI plays in shaping private cloud usage, with a focus on enhancing data protection measures.
news.headline: Private cloud adoption is increasing as enterprises prioritize security, compliance, and AI technology, with AI adoption being one of the top three reasons for private cloud use.

news.summary: A cooperation between Hitachi, Ltd. (TSE:6501) and Southwest Power Pool, Inc. (SPP) has been revealed in Santa Clara, California, and Little Rock, Arkansas. The collaboration aims to address urgent issues hindering the advancement of the energy infrastructure in the United States. Through this partnership, an advanced AI-driven solution will be developed to speed up generator interconnection (GI) processes, cutting analysis times by 80%. This initiative will enable GI clients to make quicker and more informed decisions.
news.headline: Hitachi partners with Southwest Power Pool to develop AI solution for energy infrastructure, reducing study analysis times by 80%.

news.summary: Atlanta-based Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR), a technology-focused private aviation firm, revealed plans to reach profitability in the second quarter and full year of 2025. This projection is based on strong financial performance and growth in its primary platform ventures. During the first quarter, the company generated $25.5 million in revenue with $500 thousand in net income from ongoing operations. Additionally, Volato successfully reduced total liabilities by $23.4 million during this period.
news.headline: Volato expects full-year profitability in 2025, after $25.5M revenue and $500K net income in Q1. Liabilities reduced by $23.4M.

news.summary: Enterprises are intensifying efforts to combat AI-centric threats, despite tariffs, as per a new report by Dell'Oro Group. The report, released in Redwood City, Calif. on June 5, 2025, highlights a doubling in enterprise initiatives. Dell'Oro Group, renowned for telecommunications, security, and network market insights, provides key information on industry developments. This surge underscores the growing importance of addressing AI-related risks in the business landscape.
news.headline: Network security spending rises by 12% to $6.2 billion in 1Q 2025, driven by 21% surge in app security & delivery. Enterprises focus on AI threats.

news.summary: In New York, SOLVE revealed the introduction of SOLVE Px™ for the Corporate Bond Market, an innovative AI-powered pricing tool for high-yield (HY) and investment-grade (IG) corporate bond markets. This tool encompasses more than 100,000 corporate bonds and offers highly precise trade-level pricing. SOLVE Px assists traders and portfolio managers in making decisions confidently, enhancing market efficiency.
news.headline: SOLVE launches SOLVE Px for Corporate Bond Market, covering 100,000+ bonds with AI-driven pricing tool for traders.

news.summary: George Mason University unveiled its Grand Challenge Initiative on June 5, 2025, with a significant $15 million investment. The initiative focuses on six key solutions and is set to span over five years. This bold research framework aims to address pressing issues through innovative projects and collaborations.
news.headline: George Mason University invests $15 million in Grand Challenge Initiative for a sustainable future across six key solutions.

news.summary: In Kirkland, Washington, Fusiontek, a prominent Managed Services Provider, has acquired Issaquah's Amarok, a well-known managed service provider praised for its internal software development team. This acquisition is Fusiontek's third in the last year, reflecting the company's swift expansion and dedication to enhancing its client offerings. By incorporating Amarok, Fusiontek gains custom development expertise, further solidifying its position in the market.
news.headline: Fusiontek acquires Amarok, a managed service provider, in its third acquisition in a year, boosting its development capabilities.

news.summary: This month, the first residents are set to move into the upscale luxury apartments located within a new mixed-use campus in Miami's renowned Wynwood Arts District. The project is a collaboration between L&L Holding Company, Oak Row Equities, and Shorenstein Investment Group. The apartments are part of a highly amenitized complex offering top-of-the-line facilities and services. The move-in marks the beginning of a new chapter for the vibrant district and signifies a significant milestone for the developers.
news.headline: L&L Holding Company and Oak Row Equities launch leasing at Wynwood Plaza Residences in Miami's Wynwood Arts District. Residents moving in this month.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, the passion for anime, manga, and webcomics is at an all-time high. WEBTOON Entertainment Inc., a prominent global entertainment company known for its expansive storytelling platforms, will participate in Anime Expo from July 3 to July 6. The company will present various panels during the convention and mark its inaugural presence on the Anime Expo exhibition floor with a dedicated booth. Attendees can anticipate exclusive merchandise and opportunities to meet creators.WEBTOON is eager to engage with fans at the event.
news.headline: WEBTOON to attend Anime Expo 2025, featuring "Tower of God" creator SIU. Panels and booth with exclusive merchandise.

news.summary: In London on June 5, 2025, the list of restaurants ranked from No.51 to No.100 for The World's 50 Best Restaurants 2025 was revealed by S.Pellegrino & Acqua Panna. The annual awards ceremony is scheduled for June 19 in Turin, Italy. This unveils the lesser-ranked establishments before the top 50 are announced, marking an exciting event for the culinary world.
news.headline: World's 50 Best Restaurants reveals 51-100 list for 2025, ceremony in Turin, Italy on June 19 sponsored by S.Pellegrino.

news.summary: WESLEY CHAPEL, Florida - On June 5, 2025, Lennar, a prominent homebuilder in the US, announced the commencement of sales at The Townes at Arbors at Wiregrass, a fresh development of upscale townhomes in Wesley Chapel, FL. The community features three distinct floorplans, catering to varied preferences, and is situated in a sought-after area. This latest venture by Lennar showcases their commitment to providing quality housing options in the thriving Wesley Chapel region.
news.headline: Lennar introduces luxury townhomes at The Townes at Arbors at Wiregrass in Wesley Chapel, FL.

news.summary: Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) recently revealed that their board of directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.78 per common share for the fiscal year 2025 third quarter. The dividend will be payable on July 3, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 19, 2025. It is worth noting that this dividend matches the $0.78 per common share dividend paid out in the preceding quarter. Nordson Corporation, renowned for its innovative precision technology solutions, continues to establish itself as a scalable business entity.
news.headline: Nordson Corporation declares $0.78 cash dividend per share for Q3 2025, payable on July 3, 2025.

news.summary: In San Diego, SolidProfessor, a prominent provider of technical learning materials for engineers, educators, and students, has recently been recognized as the recipient of the prestigious “Best Engineering Learning Solution” award at the 2025 EdTech Breakthrough Awards. This program, in its ninth year, is a globally acknowledged initiative celebrating outstanding achievements in educational technology. Known for its thorough assessment process, the EdTech Breakthrough Awards identifies the most influential companies and innovations in the international edtech sector, with thousands of participants vying for recognition.
news.headline: SolidProfessor awarded "Best Engineering Learning Solution" in 2025 EdTech Breakthrough Awards, rigorous evaluation process.

news.summary: Veradigm® (OTCMKTS: MDRX) has recently debuted the Smart Medicine Podcast in Chicago. Hosted by Dr. Scott Sigman, an orthopedic surgeon and popular podcaster, the show aims to offer valuable insights and motivation to clinicians, healthcare professionals, as well as payer and life science industry leaders. The podcast focuses on helping individuals navigate the complexities of modern medicine by offering incremental insights. This initiative is part of Veradigm's commitment to providing innovative healthcare data and technology solutions.
news.headline: Veradigm launches Smart Medicine Podcast hosted by Dr. Scott Sigman, aiming to provide insights for healthcare professionals.

news.summary: Oshkosh Corporation, a major player in purpose-built vehicles and equipment, is holding its Investor Day on June 5, 2025, at the New York Stock Exchange starting at 9:30 a.m. EDT. The event, available via live webcast, will offer insights into Oshkosh's business strategy, growth drivers, and financial objectives. Participants can register for the event through the provided link.
news.headline: Oshkosh Corp hosting Investor Day at NYSE on June 5, 2025, starting at 9:30 a.m. EDT. Focus on business strategy, growth, financial objectives. Join live webcast.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Ltd. (IPA) revealed a breakthrough in their research utilizing the LENSai™ platform with HYFT® technology. They identified a conserved epitope present in all four dengue virus serotypes. This discovery, made through various HYFT-based analyses, shows a specific section of the virus that has not mutated across the four serotypes. This finding has significant implications for potential advancements in dengue virus research. IPA's stock is traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol IPA.
news.headline: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Ltd. discovers a universal Dengue vaccine using AI-powered platform. Important numbers: #IPA NASDAQ:IPA 4 serotypes identified.

news.summary: In Ottawa, Ontario, MindBridge, a prominent AI-powered financial decision intelligence firm, has promoted Rachel Kirkham to Chief Technology Officer (CTO). Formerly the Senior Vice President of AI and Product, Kirkham will now oversee the company's technology and innovation strategy. She will concentrate on enhancing product capabilities, fostering transparency and trust in AI, and expanding the impact for MindBridge's expanding enterprise customer base. This move signifies the company's dedication to staying at the forefront of AI innovation.
news.headline: Rachel Kirkham promoted to Chief Technology Officer at MindBridge, focusing on advancing AI innovation and product capabilities.

news.summary: Yamaha Rightwaters™ has reinforced its dedication to marine conservation by extending its partnership with Bonefish & Tarpon Trust® (BTT) in Miami. The renewed three-year agreement aims to safeguard and revive crucial fisheries and environments. This collaboration will enhance research-based projects such as identifying habitats for young tarpons, creating nursery locations, and reviving declining ecosystems. Yamaha Rightwaters remains the "Official Outboard of the" in this endeavor.
news.headline: Yamaha Rightwaters & Bonefish Trust renew partnership for 3 years to protect marine habitats & fisheries.

news.summary: EuroDry Ltd., a company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EDRY and based in Athens, Greece, revealed its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company, specializing in owning and operating drybulk vessels for transporting drybulk cargoes by sea, shared its latest results today.
news.headline: EuroDry Ltd. disclosed Q1 2025 results in Athens, with $7.5 million revenue reported.

news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a tech firm focusing on AI drones, Enterprise SaaS, and Quantum Computing, has introduced a new Drone as a Service for US Defense and Government agencies. The company, listed on Nasdaq (ZENA), FSE (49Q), and BMV (ZENA), has announced collaborations with consulting and government relations firms to facilitate sales. This move illustrates ZenaTech's strategic expansion into the defense sector, underscoring its commitment to growth and innovation in the AI industry.
news.headline: ZenaTech launches Drone as a Service for US Defense, Govt with 2 new partnerships; specializes in AI drones.

news.summary: Toronto-based company DiagnaMed Holdings Corp. has recently acquired a strategic asset in Ontario, showcasing its advanced hydrogen extraction technology. This Canadian technology innovator, traded as CSE: DMED and OTCQB: DGNMF, focuses on clean hydrogen energy solutions. The acquisition in Ontario serves as a key milestone, highlighting the company's commitment to this sector.
news.headline: DiagnaMed acquires in Ontario to demonstrate hydrogen extraction tech proof of concept, focusing on clean energy solutions.

news.summary: Magnite has become the pioneering SSP to incorporate ContextIQ, enabling advanced contextual targeting and planning through multimodal AI for CTV advertising. This integration marks a significant advancement in advertising technology, allowing advertisers to reach their target audiences more effectively. With this integration, Magnite aims to enhance the efficiency and precision of CTV advertising campaigns, utilizing the power of AI for improved targeting strategies. This move underscores Magnite's commitment to innovation and adaptability in the rapidly evolving digital advertising landscape, setting a new standard for contextual advertising in the CTV space.
news.headline: Magnite integrates ContextIQ platform and AI Copilot to offer scene-level targeting in CTV advertising.

news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, on June 5, 2025, Core Molding Technologies, Inc. (NYSE American: CMT), a top engineered materials firm focusing on molded structural products for various industries like building products, industrial, utilities, medium and heavy-duty trucks, and powersports in the US, Canada, and Mexico, shared plans for attendance at the 15th Annual East Coast IDEAS Investor Conference on June 11, 2025, at The Westin Time Square in New York City.
news.headline: Core Molding Technologies to attend investor conference on June 11, 2025 at The Westin Time Square, New York City.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Malvern, Annovis Bio, Inc. (NYSE: ANVS) revealed plans for a live webcast featuring Maria Maccecchini, Ph.D., the President and CEO. Annovis is a company dedicated to developing new treatments for neurodegenerative ailments like Alzheimer’s disease and Parkinson’s disease. The webcast aims to offer insights and engage with the audience through updates and a Q&A session led by Dr. Maccecchini. This event signifies the company’s commitment to transparency and its ongoing efforts in the field of neurodegenerative disease research.
news.headline: Annovis Bio to host live webinar on June 24, 2025 at Malvern, PA, providing updates on Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s therapies. CEO to address questions.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was noted that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week, with over 10,000 new cases recorded. This surge brings the total number of active cases to over 50,000 in the country. Additionally, the number of hospitalizations has also increased, with more than 1,500 patients currently receiving treatment. Health officials are urging the public to follow safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to address this concerning trend.
news.headline: CG Oncology is set to attend the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference.

news.summary: Today, NV5, a company specializing in engineering, certification, and consulting services, revealed they were chosen by the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) for a lucrative five-year contract. The contract is a multiple award deal with a value of potentially $250 million. NV5 will be responsible for offering shoreline mapping services to aid the National Geodetic Survey (NGS).
news.headline: NV5 wins $250M contract from NOAA for 5 years to advance shoreline mapping for NGS.

news.summary: A cutting-edge digital dentistry experience is revolutionizing dental care by enhancing efficiency, accuracy, and esthetic results. This innovative approach leverages advanced technology to optimize dental procedures, resulting in improved outcomes for patients. With the use of digital tools, dentists can achieve precise results with higher effectiveness, ultimately transforming the landscape of dental practices. This new era of digital dentistry is paving the way for a more streamlined and successful dental experience, benefiting both practitioners and patients alike.
news.headline: ZimVie launches RealGUIDE® Dental Implant Software Suite and Implant Concierge® in Japan for improved dental care.

news.summary: Aventis Energy Inc. based in Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 5, 2025, disclosed their partnership with Axiom Exploration Group Ltd. for a Technical Report on the Corvo Uranium Project. The project is situated on the eastern edge of the Athabasca Basin in northern Saskatchewan, Canada. Aventis, trading as CSE: AVE, FRA: C0O0, and OTC: VBAMF, aims to evaluate the potential of this project as stipulated by National Instrument 43-101. The collaboration is pivotal in assessing the viability of the Corvo Uranium Project, signifying significant progress in the company’s strategic development.
news.headline: Aventis Energy will complete NI 43-101 Report on Corvo Uranium Project with Axiom Exploration Group.

news.summary: Teladoc Health, Inc., a leading provider of virtual care services, shared that its CEO Chuck Divita and CFO Mala Murthy will be attending the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference in Miami on June 11th, 2025, at 9:20 a.m. ET. The event will be live-streamed and accessible for replay at the provided link: http://ir.teladochealth.com/news-and-events/events-and-presentations.
news.headline: Teladoc Health to join Goldman Sachs Global Healthcare Conference on June 11, 2025 at 9:20 am ET. CEO and CFO to speak.

news.summary: In Petach Tikva, Israel, on June 5, 2025, NANO-X IMAGING LTD ("Nanox" or the "Company") revealed that its subsidiary, Nanox AI Ltd, specializing in deep-learning medical imaging analytics, has been granted EU MDR CE mark certification for HealthOST. This software, categorized as an SaMD (Software as a medical device), focuses on bone health analysis. The certification empowers its distribution throughout Europe and confirms its adherence to the strictest regulatory criteria for medical software. Nanox, traded on Nasdaq under NNOX, aims to leverage this accomplishment to expand its reach and impact in the medical imaging technology sector.
news.headline: Nanox's SaaS HealthOST gets EU MDR CE Mark for spine assessment. Nanox AI's HealthOST is now available for commercial use in Europe post certification.

news.summary: Bank7 Corp., the holding company of Bank7 in Oklahoma City, disclosed today the approval of a quarterly cash dividend of $0.24 per share on its common stock. Shareholders are set to receive the dividend on July 8, 2025. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BSVN.
news.headline: Bank7 Corp. (NASDAQ: BSVN) declares a $0.24 quarterly cash dividend per share on common stock, to be paid on July 8, 2025.

news.summary: Beginning on June 5, the Seoul Tourism Organization will introduce promotional videos worldwide showcasing renowned Chef Edward Lee. The campaign includes the launch of the first video, "Seoul Table for One," on June 5, followed by "Solo in Seoul" on June 11. These videos, co-produced with NBCUniversal, will be broadcasted globally to promote Seoul as a culinary destination.
news.headline: Seoul Tourism Org. unveils global campaign with star Chef Edward Lee; videos start June 5. First video "Seoul Table for One" airs, "Solo in Seoul" follows on June 11. NBCUniversal co-produced campaign.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025 in Mesquite, Texas, Gray, an integrated design-builder, marked their partnership with HiTHIUM with an event showcasing their new facility in the U.S. Gray focuses on providing comprehensive solutions in Construction, Professional Services, Specialty Equipment, and Real Estate sectors. This collaboration is a significant milestone for both companies.
news.headline: Gray reached a milestone by partnering with HiTHIUM for a first look inside their new U.S. facility in Mesquite, Texas.

news.summary: A recent partnership has led to the integration of CData Software's connectivity solutions into Palantir Technologies' systems. This collaboration will offer easy access to a wide array of data sources. CData Software, known for its data connectivity solutions, revealed the collaboration on June 5, 2025. This strategic move aims to provide users with seamless access to hundreds of data sources through embedded connectivity solutions by CData. This initiative holds promise for enhancing data accessibility and integration capabilities in the industry. The collaboration is poised to impact a significant number of users by offering a user-friendly experience to access and utilize various data sources.
news.headline: CData partners with Palantir to enhance data connectivity in Foundry, provides access to hundreds of data sources.

news.summary: AAR CORP., a prominent aviation services provider for commercial and government operators, MROs, and OEMs, based in WOOD DALE, Illinois, made an announcement on June 5, 2025, that its aviation maintenance software subsidiary, Trax, has been chosen to revamp Delta TechOps'. The corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AIR.
news.headline: AAR's Trax to modernize Delta TechOps' maintenance & engineering systems, enhancing efficiency.

news.summary: A platform called Dream Job is revolutionizing the recruitment process by assisting recruiters in identifying top talent and helping job seekers distinguish themselves from AI applications. This innovative tool has attracted over 323,000 candidates and partnered with 1,200 companies such as NPR, Everlane, Flexport, Guild, and Huntress. Job seekers can utilize the candidate portal MyGreenhouse SAN to connect with potential employers and enhance their job search experience.
news.headline: Greenhouse launches Dream Job to revolutionize job hunting, with over 323,000 candidates and 1,200 companies signed up.

news.summary: In one of Indiana's rapidly expanding cities, The Union is set to introduce upscale housing, dynamic retail outlets, and office facilities, along with Indiana's inaugural AC Hotel by Marriott. The development is led by Thompson Thrift, a comprehensive real estate firm. The project is expected to significantly boost the local economy and transform the area into a bustling hub. This initiative aims to cater to the increasing demand for premium accommodations and amenities in the region. The venture is anticipated to bring in substantial investment, creating numerous job opportunities and contributing to the overall progress of the community.
news.headline: Thompson Thrift breaks ground on final phase of $750M development near Indianapolis, bringing luxury residences, retail, office, and Indiana's first AC Hotel by Marriott.

news.summary: In celebration of its 15th year, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission's (CPSC) Pool Safely public education campaign offers essential tips for parents and caregivers to enhance water safety for children. Emphasizing the importance of constant supervision, they advise never leaving children unattended near water. This proactive approach aims to reduce water-related incidents and promote awareness about pool safety.
news.headline: CPSC shares pool safety tips after 15 years with Pool Safely campaign. Parents urged to never leave kids unattended.

news.summary: A partnership between Stand Up To Cancer® (SU2C) and SandboxAQ has been disclosed in Los Angeles on June 5, 2025. The alliance aims to utilize SandboxAQ's LQM technology to expedite innovative methods for early cancer treatment, enhancing the chances of successful intervention. This collaboration marks an important step in advancing cancer research and treatment.
news.headline: Stand Up To Cancer partners with SandboxAQ to enhance cancer treatment using LQM tech, aiming to treat cancer earlier.

news.summary: Unit4, a top provider of enterprise cloud applications for people-centric organizations, has released the second phase of its global research study. The findings reveal that businesses waste approximately 44 hours per week addressing financial discrepancies. Additionally, companies spend an average of two days per week solely on year-end financial activities. These numbers underscore the significant amount of time and resources dedicated to financial management within organizations.
news.headline: Professionals waste 44 hours/week on financial discrepancies and 2 days/week on year-end financials, according to Unit4 study.

news.summary: In Reston, Virginia on June 5, 2025, it was reported that vulnerability to jamming poses a major threat to the Global Positioning System (GPS) signal. As part of a contract with the Defense Innovation Unit, Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) is working on an alternative navigation technology to address this issue. This new technology aims to mitigate the risks associated with GPS jamming and improve navigation capabilities for military applications. The project by Leidos highlights the importance of developing innovative solutions to enhance national security.
news.headline: Leidos is developing quantum technology to counter GPS jamming, aiming to reduce military vulnerability.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in New York, PKF O'Connor Davies (PKFOD), a leading accounting, tax, and advisory firm, proudly revealed that it has attained full accreditation from the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Accreditation Body (CyberAB) as a Certified Third-Party Assessment Organization (C3PAO). This accreditation solidifies PKFOD's standing as a trusted entity in cybersecurity evaluation.
news.headline: PKF O'Connor Davies obtains CyberAB authorization as C3PAO for CMMC, becoming nation's largest accounting firm to do so.

news.summary: Today, Concierge Choice Physicians (CCP) revealed that patients now have the option for a more individualized strategy in handling their cardiology care. On June 5, 2025, in Rockville Centre, N.Y., CCP, recognized as the top full-service concierge medical service provider in the nation, shared this update. The announcement was made by Jeffrey E. Rossi, MD, FACC.
news.headline: Cardiologist Dr. Jeffrey E. Rossi joins Concierge Choice Physicians, offering personalized care option.
